case_title: MULBERRY MARKETING COMMUNICATIONS LLC VS. JENNIFER BAIR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY MULBERRY MARKETING COMMUNICATIONS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BAIR, JENNIFER DBA JENIFFER BAIR PRESENTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-13-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($35 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED MAR-04-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAIR, JENNIFER DBA JENIFFER BAIR PRESENTS
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-13-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-13-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULBERRY MARKETING COMMUNICATIONS LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-13-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MULBERRY MARKETING COMMUNICATIONS LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAIR, JENNIFER DBA JENIFFER BAIR PRESENTS $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,085.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BAIR, JENNIFER DBA JENIFFER BAIR PRESENTS
